channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Norm Eisen Frets DOJ Indictment ‘Jeopardizes’ People On SPLC’s ‘Hate List’ (And Payroll)
item.description: Eisen used his speaking time to run a full-throated defense of the SPLC bankrolling the very extremist organizations it claims it's fighting.

item.title: Met Gala-Goers Pick Classic Looks in 2026’s Fashion Feast
item.description: Bubbles, bosoms, bones, an imaginary friend, and, yes, a misfire or two raise big bucks for the Costume Institute.

item.title: Time to End Race and Gender Preferences in Government Contracts
item.description: A new bill would ensure that the principle of equal treatment under the law applies to the federal government, too.

item.title: Justice Department can keep 2020 election ballots seized from Georgia's Fulton County, judge rules
item.description: The federal government can keep the 2020 election ballots from Georgia's Fulton County that were seized by the FBI from a warehouse near Atlanta, a ju...
